entity.summary: Community-oriented ve(3,3) decentralized exchange on Polygon with current liquidity and active recent swap volume.
entity.notes: The official Dystopia GitHub organization preserves the dystopia.exchange domain and exchange implementation repositories. DefiLlama reports current Polygon TVL and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. The first-party website remains live_unverified because it was not fully fetched in this review pass.

evidence.title: Dystopia official GitHub organization
evidence.notes: Official organization preserves the dystopia.exchange domain and publishes Dystopia swap, contracts, subgraph, token-list, and brand repositories.

evidence.title: Dystopia metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Dystopia as a Polygon ve(3,3) DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Dystopia DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Dystopia as a Polygon decentralized exchange.
